sys_ux_macroponent.name: NextForm
sys_ux_macroponent.props: [ { "defaultValue": "", "description": "The unique identifier of the NextForm", "fieldType": "string", "label": "NextForm SysID", "mandatory": true, "name": "nextFormSysId", "readOnly": false, "selectable": false, "typeMetadata": null, "valueType": "string" }, { "defaultValue": {}, "description": "To be consumed by the generator", "disabled": false, "fieldType": "json", "icon": "square-curly-bracket-outline", "id": "formData", "label": "Generator metadata", "name": "formData", "typeMetadata": {} }, { "defaultValue": {}, "description": "Any extra info needed by the processor", "disabled": false, "fieldType": "json", "icon": "square-curly-bracket-outline", "id": "metadata", "label": "Processor metadata", "name": "metadata", "typeMetadata": {} }, { "defaultValue": null, "description": "Only form values that were changed will be sent to the processor.", "disabled": false, "fieldType": "boolean", "icon": "checkbox-checked-outline", "id": "processEditedOnly", "label": "Only process edited values", "mandatory": false, "name": "processEditedOnly", "readOnly": false, "selectable": false, "typeMetadata": {}, "valueType": "string" } ]
